speaker: speaker1
text: I'm just calling to see if you have made any decision about the position .

speaker: speaker2
text: Sorry , we haven't made the decision at all .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you have any idea when you might arrive at a decision ?

speaker: speaker2
text: We will let you know probably next Monday . I hope to give you a positive reply .

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm willing to wait until you have come to a decision .
